free_text: Data tables.
Engl.translation of YF,77,154,2014
Investigation of 238U in the (n, n' gamma) reaction.
Details of exp.method and data analysis.
IR-8 Reactor
Reactor
Fast neutron beam from reactor active zone was
filtered by 50 mm natural uranium, 10 mm B4C and
0.5 mm Cd .
HPGe detector of 20% efficiency, 1.8 keV
resolution at 1.2 MeV energy.
U sample of 17.7 g , 2.3 g/cm2 thickness.
Gamma spectra were measured at 90, 105, 115, 125, 135,
142, 150 deg angles relative to neutron beam.
Energy range up to 2.7 MeV.
Gammas
M.M.
Older experiment in 40318 .
Intensities of gamma lines.
Energies are measured at 90 deg angle,
intensities at 125 deg angle.
All intensities were measured relative to the intensity
of 635.3 keV gamma-line from U-238(N,NG) reaction,
which is given as 100. arb.units in Tables 1, 2 of
DATA were divided by 100. by compiler to obtain NO-DIM
units.
For self-absorption in sample.
For backgrounds due to neutron interaction with
detector and setup materials.
For contribution from fission fragments; data used for
this correction are given in Table 1 of
Level scheme is based on data from these two articles.
Doublet.
Intensity is too high for this level.
Contribution from prompt gamma-rays is expected,
but not subtracted.
Intensity is marked by "<<" - not explained.
Intensity is marked by ">=" - not explained.
Level energy is marked by "?" - questionable.
Authors are not sure, that 258.53 keV gamma line is
(10+ -> 8+) transition, but not gamma line from a
fission fragment.
Gamma energy is marked by "?" - questionable.
In Subent 004 - all directly measured
gammas.

assumed as new - hypothesized levels of 238U.
